title: 2 Sizes Silicone Pan Handle Covers - Heat Resistant Non-Slip Handle Sleeves for Cast Iron Skillets, Metal Frying Pans, Kitchen Cooking Accessories, Grey
features: 🍳【Multiple Sizes】: Our silicone hot handle holder sleeve has two sizes for you to choose from. The small size is suitable for handles with a diameter of 1.0-3.3 cm and a length of 16-19 cm; the large size is suitable for handles with a diameter of 2.0-5.6 cm and a length of 19-21 cm.

🍳【High-quality Materials】: Our pot handle sleeves are made of food-grade silicone, which is non-toxic and odorless, high temperature resistant and not easy to deform (can withstand temperatures of 250℃/482℉), and has hydrophilic and oleophobic properties, will not hide dirt, and can be easily washed off with oil stains.

🍳【Automatic Pull-out Design】: Easy to operate, pull-out design. Just put the Silicone Hot Handle Holder on the bottom of the pot handle, gently pull the pull ring at the end, and pull it in the direction of the marked arrow, and the pot handle sleeve will automatically adjust to fit the pot handle. If there is extra silicone sleeve, you can cut it off.

🍳【Comfortable Grip, Prevent Burns】: This product is comfortable to hold, can effectively insulate, and enhances the grip. It stays cool even at high temperatures, providing you with a more pleasant cooking experience.

🍳【More Applications】: This silicone pot handle cover is not only suitable for kitchen utensils, but also can be used for racket handles, bicycle handles, fishing rod handles, etc., providing a better grip and use experience.
